channel.title: Deeptech Daily
channel.description: A short daily briefing on deeptech, robotics, and space startups.
channel.itunes:author: Deeptech Daily

item.title: AGIBOT's 15,000th Robot + Euclid Peers Into the Milky Way's Heart
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back to Deeptech Daily. It is Monday, June 29, 2026, and we've got a couple of genuinely exciting stories to dig into today — one from the world of robotics, one from deep space. Let's get into it.
First up, a major milestone in embodied AI. Chinese robotics company AGIBOT...

item.description:

item.title: Musk Buys SpaceX Alumni Startup + $320M to Train Robots with Video Games
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back to Deeptech Daily. It's Saturday, June 27, 2026, and we've got a genuinely fascinating mix of stories today — from Elon Musk snapping up a stealth startup to a wild new approach to training robots using video game footage. Let's get into it.

item.title: Starlink Vets Go Independent + Europe's Orbit Security Wake-Up Call
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back to Deeptech Daily — I'm so glad you're here. It's Friday, June 26, 2026, and we've got a genuinely interesting mix of stories today spanning space security, the future of satellite infrastructure, and some notable moves in the investment world. Let's get into it.

item.title: Agility Robotics Goes Public + China's Reusable Rocket Debut
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back to Deeptech Daily. It's Thursday, June 25, 2026, and we've got a packed show today covering humanoid robots going public, China's next big rocket move, and a new satellite defense partnership you're going to want to hear about. Let's get into it.

item.title: SpaceX's Secret Reentry Capsule + Agility Robotics Goes Public
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back to Deeptech Daily. It's Wednesday, June 24, 2026, and we've got a packed show today — a secretive SpaceX mission, a big robotics IPO, and a drone startup that just raised half a billion euros. Let's get into it.
So the story everyone's been buzzing about is SpaceX's...
